goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the north
The hotel should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get star of the hotel
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get attraction type
